title: Multi-dimensional Autoscaling of Processing Services: A Comparison of Agent-based Methods

methodology.environment: Edge device with two processing services

key_contributions: Introducing an agent-based autoscaling approach for Edge and CC systems
Allowing scaling policies tailored to individual services
Enabling building composite and customizable scaling policies
challenges_addressed: Resource-constrained computing hardware at Edge and CC
Infeasibility of traditional Cloud-based autoscaling in resource-limited environments
Need for flexible scaling behavior in multiple elasticity dimensions
